text:
HELLDIVERS™ 2 Campaign Brief: Census Thunder
The Frontline of Freedom confirms that new “Voids” are undemocratically unleashing Illuminate forces across the galaxy.

Helldivers are encouraged to investigate, contain the threat, and recover intelligence. Outstanding service may result in the choice of a fabulous new Fast Recon Vehicle!

Dive now to take the fight to the Squids and drive away with your new ride.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
The Division 2: Into the Dark - Official Launch Trailer
Agents, it's time to venture into the dark.
 
This season, Hyenas flood the streets with a stronger, new supply of Spice, and Agents must go into the Dark Zones to fight back. Explore refreshed Dark Zones featuring weekly rotations, including a new PvE experience and a major PvP update across all modes. Plus, a new Incursion is coming later this season.
 
Packed with rotating Dark Zones, all-new Classified Assignments, a brand-new Season Pass, and an upcoming Incursion, Into the Dark is a season of intense risk, tactical choice, and high‑stakes extractions.
 
Play The Division 2: Into the Dark now.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/tom-clancys-the-division-2/BVQ3V30ZXVT5/0001

text:
Copa City - Launch Trailer
Forget the dugout. Take charge of the streets. Copa City is officially OUT NOW on XBOX Series X|S! 

Get ready for the world’s first football tycoon game where you don’t manage the squad - you manage everything else. As the City Captain, the entire city is your canvas. You’ll be adapting the stadium, building fan zones, managing safety, and running the whole show for a global fanbase before the opening whistle even blows.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den Official Trailer | Overwatch
Are you ready to step Into the Tiger’s Den?

A new chapter in the Reign of Talon starts here with the arrival of our newest Damage Hero, Shion. As the Hashimoto Clan’s most terrifying elder, Shion brings a dangerous new arsenal to the battlefield with her dual semi-auto pistols and a motorcycle she can crash into her enemies.

Battle through the streets of Tokyo in the all-new Hybrid Map, Neon Junction, filled with nods to Japanese culture and easter eggs around every corner. Tokyo also comes to life in our new Anima Strike Meta Event where you earn new rewards based on which path you choose to go down.

That’s not all though! Unlock brand new cosmetics through the Season 3 Battle Pass and in the Shop like Illari’s Ascendant Phoenix Mythic Hero Skin, Hanzo’s Tokyo Rebel Mythic Weapon Skin, new Ultra Skins with added VFX, new skins as part of our upcoming YOASOBI collaboration, and much more.

Experience all that Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den has to offer.

Overwatch is free to play on PC and console

SUBSCRIBE TO XBOX: https://xbx.lv/2EEjmaR

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Warframe | Jade Shadows: Constellations Official Gameplay Trailer - Available Now
***Warning: Significant spoilers for the original Jade Shadows Quest follow!***

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/warframe/bps3xf74b9v1

Consequences continue in Jade Shadows: Constellations with a new cinematic Quest that picks up where 2024's fan-favorite update, Jade Shadows, left off.

Reassume control of the Stalker as he allies once more with the Tenno to navigate a conflict of celestial proportions. His dueling sons from parallel futures have come to the Origin System in search of their father, and will stop at nothing to claim him for their respective timelines. 

Constituting the first dual Warframe, Sirius & Orion jockey for position on the battlefield and can be switched on the fly for maximum destruction. They debut alongside their mentors — the silently lethal Ryoku (Ash Protoframe) and bloodthirsty Vena (Garuda Protoframe), who share a murderous rivalry of their own. After completing the Quest, you join them in the Uranus Proxima for spectacular ship-to-ship combat in our most accessible Railjack Missions yet.

Our latest update also includes the release of Styanax Prime Access and Dante Tytonis, along with new Incarnons, Signas, Operator/Drifter hairstyles, Arcanes, Augments and Atragraphs.



►► WHAT IS WARFRAME? 

Join 90M+ registered players in Warframe, a cooperative, free-to-play third-person looter shooter set in a constantly evolving sci-fi universe.

#Warframe #Gameplay #Trailer
 #XBOX

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
PAW Patrol Dino World | The Volcano
🌋🦖 Parents, danger is rising in the Volcano region of PAW Patrol Dino World. 

After a mysterious explosion shakes Dino Island, the pups race into the Volcano to uncover what Mayor Humdinger has been hiding. Deep inside crystal caves and lava-filled paths, they discover his master plan that could put the entire island at risk. 

Join Marshall, Zuma, Chase, Skye, Rubble, Rocky, and the rest of the PAW Patrol pups as they calm frightened dinosaurs, rescue trapped friends, dodge volcanic hazards, and work together to stop the eruption before it’s too late. 

Inspired by the world of the upcoming PAW Patrol Dino Movie, this open-world video game adventure is packed with exploration, teamwork, and high-stakes rescues 🌋✨ 

#PAWPatrolDinoWorld #PAWPatrol #NickJr
